case.title: CORSO v. SECURITY-FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF LOS ANGELES

opinion.h1: CORSO v. SECURITY-FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF LOS ANGELES, 362 U.S. 144 (1960)
opinion.h4: CORSO v. SECURITY-FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF LOS ANGELES, EXECUTOR. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, SECOND APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 652. Decided March 7, 1960.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE BLACK is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
